extraction.one_line_summary: HERMANS Ben attacked on Green Mountain final climb, held off charging ARU Fabio by 3 seconds to win and extend GC lead
tactical_patterns: MORTON Lachlan used as domestique to launch early attack on Green Mountain, softening field before leader move.
KUDUS Merhawi attacked before race favorite HERMANS, serving as tactical foil that forced early GC response.
BMC waited until after breakaway caught and tempo attacks failed before unleashing HERMANS, preserving energy for decisive move.
BARDET Romain attempted two separate attacks on Green Mountain climb but couldn't sustain gap, showing climbing form weakness.

rider_signals.HERMANS Ben: positive: delivered pre-race climbing expectations on Green Mountain with perfectly timed attack, holding off superior climber ARU
rider_signals.ARU Fabio: positive: fastest finisher on Green Mountain climb but tactical patience cost him stage win by 3 seconds
rider_signals.KUDUS Merhawi: positive: white jersey showed willingness to attack GC favorites on decisive climb despite youth
rider_signals.MORTON Lachlan: positive: executed classic domestique sacrifice attack to soften peloton before protected rider's move
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: negative: two failed attacks on Green Mountain reveal inability to sustain accelerations against rested climbers
rider_signals.CHRISTIAN Mark: negative: crashed while in breakaway hunting aggression points, losing classification opportunity
